ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (e.g., Right, Left, Both) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the family the participant grew up in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the participant */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the participant */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the participant's parents */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the participant */,
  "disabilities" TEXT /* Any disabilities that the participant might have */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Exact date of birth of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level attained by the participant (e.g., University degree, Graduate degree) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average (GPA) of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the education level record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "childhood_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment entry */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of childhood environment (e.g., Urban, Suburban, Rural) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "parental_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant's parents */,
  "number_of_siblings" INTEGER /* Number of siblings the participant has */,
  "parental_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant's parents */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., own, rent, public housing) */,
  "neighborhood_safety" TEXT /* Perceived safety of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the childhood environment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the childhood environment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_childhood_environment_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score entry */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the participant on a test */,
  "test_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the participant to complete the test (in seconds) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's ID */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., cognitive, psychological) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was taken */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
